services.title: Services
services.rfq.sent: RFQ sent to {count, plural, one {# vendor} other {# vendors}}

browse.title: Services
browse.subtitle: Find trusted providers across Zambia — from beauty to home repairs.
browse.emptyBody: Try another category or area, or check back soon for new listings.
browse.providerPitch: Reach customers looking for what you offer.

detail.metaDescription: {title} in {area}. View portfolio and request a quote on Vergeo5.
detail.requestQuoteHint: Describe your job and get quotes from matching providers.

list.title: Your services
list.intro: Manage service listings customers can browse and request quotes for.
list.empty: You have no service listings yet.

form.includesHint: One item per line — shown as a checklist on your service page.
form.fromPriceHint: Leave blank to show "ask for quote"
form.bookableHint: Customers can book and pay a deposit at a fixed price, without requesting a quote first.
form.bookingPriceHint: Total price for a direct booking. Customers pay a deposit now and the balance when the job is done.

errors.bookablePrice: Set a fixed booking price greater than zero to allow direct booking.
errors.authRequired: Sign in to manage your services.

postJob.title: Post a job
postJob.subtitle: Describe what you need — matching providers will send quotes.

description.label: What do you need done?
description.placeholder: E.g. Fix a leaking kitchen tap before Saturday

photos.label: Photos (optional)
photos.help: Up to 8 photos to help providers understand the job.

postJob.authRequired: Sign in to post your job
postJob.draftSaved: Your draft is saved on this device until you sign in.

ack.sent: We notified matching providers. Quotes usually arrive within a day.
ack.noMatch: We could not find matching providers right now, but we will keep looking and notify you.

errors.required: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

list.title: Your jobs
list.intro: Compare quotes from providers and choose the best fit.
list.emptyBody: Post a job to receive quotes from matching providers.

quotes.compareIntro: Sorted by price, then provider rating. Withdrawn and expired quotes are hidden.
quotes.empty: No active quotes yet — providers usually respond within a day.

decline.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Price too high, need sooner date…

errors.loadFailed: Could not load quotes. Try again.
errors.forbidden: You can only compare quotes on your own jobs.
errors.declineFailed: Could not decline quote. Try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.notMatched: This provider was not matched to the job.

accept.title: Accept this quote
accept.intro: Pay a {pct}% deposit now to secure {vendor}. The balance is due when the work is done.
accept.escrowNote: Your deposit is held safely by Vergeo5 and only released to the provider once the work is confirmed.

errors.notOwner: You can only accept quotes on your own jobs.
errors.mismatch: That quote does not belong to this job.
errors.invalidStatus: This job or quote can no longer be accepted.
errors.generic: Could not start the deposit. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

provider.title: Mark this job complete
provider.intro: Let the customer know the work is done. They have 48 hours to confirm before it is auto-confirmed and your payment is released.
provider.marked: Marked complete. Waiting for the customer to confirm.
provider.alreadyMarked: You already marked this job complete.

errors.notProvider: Only the assigned provider can mark this job complete.
errors.notFound: This job could not be found.
errors.generic: Could not mark the job complete. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

customer.title: Confirm the work is done
customer.intro: Confirm to release the balance to your provider. If you do nothing, we auto-confirm after 48 hours.
customer.confirmed: Confirmed. Your provider has been paid.
customer.awaitingProvider: Waiting for your provider to mark the job complete.
customer.escrowNote: You paid → Held by Vergeo5 → Released to your provider once you confirm.
customer.reviewUnlocked: Thanks! You can now leave a review for this provider.

errors.notOwner: You can only confirm your own jobs.
errors.notMarked: Your provider has not marked this job complete yet.
errors.generic: Could not confirm the job. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

reviews.heading: Reviews for this provider
reviews.subheading: From customers whose jobs this provider completed.

form.title: Rate your provider
form.intro: Your job is complete — share how it went.
form.ratingAria: Select a rating from 1 to 5 stars

errors.generic: Could not submit your review. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many review requests. Please wait a moment.

booking.title: Book this service
booking.intro: Pay a {pct}% deposit now; the balance is due when the job is done.
booking.escrowNote: You pay → Held by Vergeo5 → Released to your provider once you confirm the job is done.

errors.authRequired: Please sign in to book this service.
errors.notBookable: This service is not available for direct booking right now.
errors.ownService: You cannot book your own service.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.generic: Could not start your booking. Please try again.
